step_rationale: Bioactive lipid mediators; promote endothelial activation, monocyte recruitment and plaque inflammation.
mechanism: Lysolipids generated from lipoprotein remodeling act as endothelial and immune-cell activators, driving plaque inflammation.

references.title: Bioactive lipids in plasma and atherogenic apoB-containing lipoproteins: Effects of statins and PCSK9 inhibitors and relevance to residual cardiovascular risk.
